claim: The H1 trigger produced the documented Dapr failure on ca-labdapr-5nichn--md3mnmx: Dapr remained enabled but appPort changed to 8081, ingress / still returned HTTP 200 from the app, the loopback Dapr invoke path failed, and the active revision stayed Running.
gate_classification: H1 gate: confirms the Dapr appPort mismatch produced a sidecar-to-app failure while ingress reachability remained intact.

sub_gates.claim: The pre-fix Dapr config keeps Dapr enabled while changing appPort to 8081.
The pre-fix ingress root still returns HTTP 200 from the app workload.
The pre-fix loopback Dapr invocation fails.
